_doc: Repos that NAME-COLLIDE with the baditaflorin fleet but are deliberately NOT part of it. fleet-runner reads this file and skips matching directories everywhere (classify, shape, sed, exec, push, update-dep). Each entry is the github repo name (last segment of repo_url).

excludes.reason: separate project that happens to use the go- prefix; not part of the 0exec / 0crawl meshes. Removed from services.json. Do not auto-clone, do not run fleet-wide ops on it.
